identity.badgeText: Coming soon to the App Store
identity.description: Human Lab helps you run short, science-backed experiments on yourself. Pick a category, follow a structured study, check in daily, and discover what actually works for your stress, sleep, energy, and habits.

audience.landingPhrase: curious self-improvers who want evidence—not guesswork
audience.primary: Curious self-improvers and quantified-self enthusiasts who want evidence—not guesswork—about what changes actually improve their wellbeing.
audience.secondary: Wellness app users who have tried habit trackers or biohacking tools but abandoned them because results felt anecdotal or unsustainable.
painPoints: Trying interventions without knowing whether they actually work for you
Abandoning multi-day experiments before completion because adherence is hard
Wellness advice that sounds convincing but lacks personal data or rigorous structure
No single place to run structured n-of-1 experiments with daily check-ins and clear results

personas.name: Quantified Self Explorer
personas.summary: Tracks sleep, mood, and habits already. Wants a structured way to test one change at a time and see whether it moves the needle.

personas.name: Skeptical Optimizer
personas.summary: Tried meditation apps, supplements, and morning routines. Needs a playful, low-friction lab to prove what is worth keeping.

cta.buyNowText: Buy Now on the App Store

style.styleNotes: Mad-scientist lab aesthetic with neon accents. Encouraging and curious—not clinical or preachy. Celebrate experiments completed, not perfection.

mockup.notes: Interactive prototype demonstrating welcome flow, category selection, experiment detail, active dashboard, daily check-in, and results screens.

inline.headline: Stop guessing. Start testing.
inline.subheadline: Run short experiments on yourself and discover what actually works.
inline.body:
Human Lab turns self-improvement into structured, science-backed experiments. Pick a category—stress, sleep, energy, or habits—follow a guided study for 7 to 45 days, check in daily, and see whether the change made a real difference for you.

No miracle claims. No generic advice. Just your data, your experiments, and an AI scientist in your corner.

inline.headline: Your personal evidence lab
inline.subheadline: Science-backed experiments, daily check-ins, and clear results.

inline.headline: Built for people who want proof
inline.body: Add testimonials or beta feedback here when available.

inline.headline: Simple pricing
inline.subheadline: $6.99/month after a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

inline.headline: Ready to run your first experiment?
inline.subheadline: Start testing what actually works—for you.

seo.title: Human Lab — Stop guessing. Start testing.
seo.description: Run short science-backed experiments on yourself. Discover what actually works for stress, sleep, energy, and habits.

benefits.title: 7–45 day studies
benefits.description: Structured experiments with clear start and end dates.

benefits.title: Real data
benefits.description: Daily check-ins build a personal evidence base.

benefits.title: AI lab scientist
benefits.description: Guidance and encouragement grounded in research.

features.title: Science-backed experiment catalog
features.description: Browse curated experiments with peer-reviewed sources—not influencer hype. Each study links to real research so you know why you're testing something.

features.title: Structured daily check-ins
features.description: Complete short check-ins during your experiment. Track adherence, mood, and outcomes without spreadsheets or guesswork.

features.title: Category-based lab
features.description: Choose what you want to improve—stress, sleep, energy, nutrition, focus, and more. Each category offers experiments sized for real life.

features.title: Your AI lab scientist
features.description: Get guidance, encouragement, and context as you run experiments. The mad-scientist mascot keeps the process playful while staying grounded in evidence.

features.title: Clear results
features.description: When your experiment ends, review what happened. See whether the intervention worked for you—not for an average user in a marketing slide.

faq.question: What is Human Lab?
faq.answer: Human Lab is a self-experimentation app for iOS. You pick a science-backed experiment, run it for a set number of days, check in daily, and review whether it actually improved your target outcome.

faq.question: How is this different from a habit tracker?
faq.answer: Habit trackers help you repeat behaviors. Human Lab helps you test whether a specific intervention works for you—with a start date, end date, daily data, and a results summary. Think n-of-1 experiment, not endless streaks.

faq.question: Do I need to be a scientist to use it?
faq.answer: No. Experiments are pre-designed with plain-language instructions and linked research. You follow the protocol, log check-ins, and review results when the study completes.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Human Lab offers a 7-day free trial, then $6.99/month. Cancel anytime from your account settings. Pricing may change before public launch—see the landing page for current terms.

faq.question: Is my data private?
faq.answer: Your experiment data is yours. We do not sell personal health data. A full privacy policy will be published before launch.

faq.question: What platforms are supported?
faq.answer: The full product targets iOS. This package includes an interactive web mockup for validation—the landing page embeds the deployed mockup URL; it does not import mockup source code directly.

events.name: buy_now_clicked
events.description: User clicked Buy Now / purchase CTA

events.description: User opened or interacted with live mockup preview

experiment.hypothesis: We believe curious self-improvers will submit email and express buy intent at a CPA below $8 because Human Lab offers structured, science-backed n-of-1 experiments instead of generic habit advice.
successCriteria: At least 200 unique landing page visitors

decisionRules.winnerThreshold: CPA below $8 AND buy-now rate above 2.5% after min sample size
decisionRules.killThreshold: CPA above $20 after 50% of budget spent with fewer than 10 email signups
decisionRules.notes: Pause for manual review if CPA is $8–$15 at day 10 with positive engagement but low conversions.
